Exquisite Velium War Lance  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Piercing Atk Delay: 36
DMG: 32 Dmg Bonus: 132
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 6.5 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR PAL SHD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Exquisite Velium War Lance
Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Piercing Atk Delay: 36
DMG: 32 Dmg Bonus: 132
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 6.5 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR PAL SHD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:2H Piercing
Stackable:No
Tribute:894

Source:Live

Page Updated:Sat Aug 31st, 2024

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare

Post Comment
Probably not relevant anymore but...
QuoteReply
# Aug 31 2024 at 4:31 AM Rating: Good
Telak
7 posts
[Sat Aug 31 02:44:51 2024] --You have looted an Exquisite Velium War Lance from a Chetari Dominator's corpse.-

Confirmed a mob in DN dropped it. This was on teek but not a rare or mob that should have been randomed. Not sure if its a quirk or normal. I have not previously seen an exquisite weapon drop off normal rats and I've spent a lot of time here.
▲ Page top
fyi
QuoteReply
# Jun 19 2001 at 12:25 AM Rating: Excellent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
amazing weapon picked wun up the other day and i (warrior) use it in preference to a lot of other toys.

at 32/36 when you use your mighty strikin discipline, with 255 str and 232 skill inpiercing you can do a ******** of crips up to around the mid 400's. I can hit harder by a negligable amount using my truncheon of doom 33/44 but obviously nowhere near as speedily )


this weapon is pure power and rather amazing to boot, we got it using one group and im nearly 100% certain it came off a chetari warrior/dominator kind of mob not a dust or chelaki etc however that dont mean it wont :)

just go to the ramp down into the chetari caves and stop short of the beetle trap and pull theres a wanderer there every 28 mins or so and it can be nasty to have trap wanderer and pull on you as a single group at once since the enchanters have a tough time using their normal mezz's, use short duration mezz to stick it first off and then go with what you know shamans a must and our shaman found that using lower lvl spells sometimes helped (i think he was sticking em with like ridiculous wimpy poison bolt **** at the end but it was sticking every time and every bit helps).We picked up this weapon a 30/35 claydmore a 32/40 brawl stick(not sure on stats) and a 30/35 war lance. Took about 4 hours of camping and included 2 cr's due to unfavourable conditions(more then 3 unmezzable mobs in camp at any one time).


thanks go to me bruddah cailen the enchanter masheen), who won the roll on this monster then passed it on to me a lil later in the day heh. Me being a warrior was creaming about this baby and he did a mighty deed by lettin me in on the action, afterwe'd nocked keleren'dar on his *** in cobalt scar.

Bushka Everluvin
ogure warrior to da stars.

Of course its not rogue useable, its a 2H piercer
just because it is a piercing weapon does not mean rogues should automatically be able to use it

# May 07 2001 at 6:15 PM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
This 2h piercing is exactly the same as 1h piercing except that you cannot use a shield or another weapon for the warriors part... but it uses the normal piercing skll no strange 2h piercing skill its just that normal dumbass piercing skill.. i know because i got a hardened velium war lance from DN and i do about 140 damage a hit with lvl 47 with a skill of 200. Its a great weapon try i t with Enc Haste Spells. ;)

Backstab damage is capped at around 550 damage, if you use your lvl 59 or 60 discipline duelist you can get around 1107 which it is capped at. plus verant wont gives rogues a mainhand piercing weapon over 15 damage.

__DEL__1591762086122
235 posts
They have at least two 16-dmg piercers... Bloodbath and Khalazar (SP?). Both are redicliously difficult to attain tho.
▲ Page top
RE: backstab
QuoteReply
# Oct 13 2002 at 10:04 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591780308579
51 posts
theres an AA which is a 32k backstab...
▲ Page top
RE: backstab
QuoteReply
# Jun 25 2003 at 8:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761991555
Scholar
300 posts
There is no AA for a 32k backstab. The AA you're referring to is Finishing Blow. It allows a player with the AA (any melee) to instantly kill a mob that is under 10% health and fleeing. This doesn't work on rooted mobs, mobs that don't run, or mobs over a certain level (I think 52 pre-PoP, up to 59 with PoP AA). It presents itself in game as a finishing blow of 32000 points.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 23 2001 at 5:43 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I once saw a rogue in sebilis assassinate a Froglok for 32,000pts of damage. When I saw that I laughed so hard I nearly cried. It was awesome.
to mr ignorant people
QuoteReply
# May 05 2001 at 11:51 PM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
backstab increases on a scale similar to that of a logorithmic scale if you were to graph it as damage dealt vs. damage listed on weapon. so a rogue with the skill to bs for 1k damage using a 15 dam weapon could verry well bs for 10k using a 32 damage weapon. this is the very reason verant will never give rogues a 1hand pierce that is over 15 dam.

looks great i saw an ogre war with one. he stopped and told me about it after he heard me say woe what in the 9 gates of hell is that;)
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 05 2001 at 3:50 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Seeing as a rogue can pierce for over 1000 damage with a ragebringer, imagine a rogue BSing with this LOL, he would hit for 10k-ish. I would LOVE to see that tho =)
Pierce
QuoteReply
# May 04 2001 at 11:29 PM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Just to clarify. 2H Pierce is a skill, but it falls in the domain of pierce. It isn't its own skill. It has been around since Velious. Rogues cannot use 2H pierce weapons because they were intended to be used by tank classes (rogues are a kind of "in-between" class). Verant was hoping to get more players into using piercing weapons, since it seemed only shamans and rogues bothered with the skill.
▲ Page top
RE: Pierce
QuoteReply
# May 04 2001 at 11:45 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593965790794
328 posts
Well done, poster! Though the main purpose of the 2hPierce was for the "Lance" style warrior (though I'm waiting for the horses, but not holding my breate :) ). If you think about the size of this weapon, you can't see a small thief running around with a HUGE lance trying to sneak up on someone and BS them...uh uh, ain't happenin' :), though it would be pretty :)

I (as a Paladin) am quite happy with the new 2hPiercers. The MotQ wasn't all that, but it IS a stepping stone to these really nice 2hP's.

# May 04 2001 at 9:21 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592245676632
Scholar
138 posts
jesus almost every single 2h piercing weapon has someone asking about 2h piercing :p
the "2h piercing" part is to the right of "Skill:", just before "Atk"
▲ Page top
RE: 2h piercing?
QuoteReply
# May 04 2001 at 11:42 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Tenon, no crap! Glad this has been annoying someone else. Sheesh, there isn't an "almost every" to it, it has been every DAMN one. You'd think they would notice it the first time. The sad part is, it's the exact same phrasing. If I didn't know any better, (that people in general are idiots), I'd say it was one person trying (and succeeding) at pissing me off!

Feel free to rate this down, it will be on long enough to get the point across to the morons! Open your eyes, as Tenon says, it's just to the right of "Skill:", and just before "Atk Delay:"
